title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz Life
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz Life in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
